stories.title: HMRC writing to thousands of 21-year-olds about forgotten Child Trust Funds
stories.summary: Thousands of 21-year-olds across the UK are to be written to by HM Revenue and Customs, reminding them they have a forgotten Child Trust Fund worth on average £2,200. The Government announced the campaign on 23 April. More than 750,000 Child Trust Fund accounts remain unclaimed, according to figures from HM Treasury and HMRC. Child

stories.title: Police appeal for help finding missing 15-year-old last seen at Deeside Leisure Centre
stories.summary: North Wales Police have appealed for help to find a missing 15-year-old last seen at Deeside Leisure Centre on Thursday evening. Officers said they had growing concerns for Jaden, who was last seen at the leisure centre at 8.30pm on 23 April. The force said it believed he was currently in the Flint area, but

stories.title: Missing person appeal launched to locate 15 year old last seen at Deeside Leisure Centre
stories.summary: Police have published the above image and are asking “Have you seen Jaden?” North Wales Police said, “We have growing concerns for 15-year-old Jaden, who was last seen at 20:30 at Deeside Leisure Centre on the 23rd of April 2026.” “He is believed to currently be in the Flint area however as stated has links

stories.title: Latter-day Saints consult on plans to demolish Ewloe meeting house and rebuild at twice the size
stories.summary: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints is consulting the community on plans to demolish its meeting house at St David’s Park in Ewloe and replace it with a building more than twice the size. The Church already holds planning permission for an extension to the existing building, granted by Flintshire County Council in

stories.title: Police warn of rise in mobile phone and courier scams
stories.summary: A warning has been issued amid a rise in EE and O2 contract scams and courier fraud targeting residents across the region. Police say that scammers are targeting members of the public with calls, texts and emails claiming to represent either mobile network or another trusted organisation.
